caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white baseball cap, large black over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie featuring a gold logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". He sits behind a desk equipped with a professional black broadcast microphone on a swivel arm. Behind him, a white backdrop displays a repeating logo with five stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE". A blue sign on the wall above reads "BOSS Where BOSSES Talk!", and a larger red and white sign below it says "TALK 101". On the desk, there is a black equipment case and a black mug with red and white text that says "TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, while the camera angle and his position remain constant.
